title: What happened?
content:
What happened?

Make me in.

But I'm also not looking for somebody to take advantage of me.

No.

And that's such a bad tone.

It creates.

It is.

It's a very bad tone.

I mean, when I was , when I worked at home, you probably all five, I asked for was was a schedule.

I didn't care where it was.

I didn't care if I had to come to work at 6:00 in the morning, 10 o':00 in the morning, you tell me when you want me to come here, and I'll be here when you tell me to come here.Cause I had the kids...

And I needed I needed, you know, I needed a set schedule .

My manager said, 100%, I agree with you.

You know, that's what we do.

We're a family company, you know, we care about our employloyees, this that and the other thing.

And every bee can tell me I was going to get a schedule. Every week..
